page_content:
GREK499 Independent Study in Greek Language and Literature (1-3 Credits) Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Classics department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

GREK603 Greek Tragedy (3 Credits) The reading of two tragedies of the Athenian tragedians. Detailed discussion of historical background, literary art, thought, and the circumstances and manner of their production. Other tragedies will be read in English.
